description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Pytest that runs on push and pull request events. Use a matrix strategy to test on multiple Python versions (3.6, 3.7, 3.8, 3.9) across different Ubuntu environments (latest and 20.04). For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, install test dependencies, and run unit tests with pytest while excluding slow tests and generating coverage reports for the compressai module.
